rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §44.0411, which governs school district contract change orders. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 44.0411. CHANGE ORDERS. (a) If a change in plans or specifications is necessary after the performance of a contract is begun
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses school district construction contract change orders, unrelated to homestead exemption.
